ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine sample */,
  "vintage" INTEGER /* Year the wine was produced */,
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winery producing the wine */,
  "grape_variety" INTEGER /* Type of grape used in the wine */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region where the wine is produced */,
  "bottle_size" INTEGER /* Size of the bottle in milliliters */,
  "production_method" TEXT /* Method used in production */,
  "bottling_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine was bottled */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the wine is stored */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year the grapes were harvested */,
  "blend" TEXT /* Whether the wine is a blend of different grape varieties */,
  "organic" TEXT /* Whether the wine is organic */,
  "biodynamic" TEXT /* Whether the wine is biodynamically produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_grape_variety FOREIGN KEY ("grape_variety") REFERENCES grape_varieties ("grape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_winery_id FOREIGN KEY ("winery_id") REFERENCES wineries ("winery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_quality" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample being assessed */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity level of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity level of the wine */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid level of the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar content in the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides content in the wine */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Free sulfur dioxide level in the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Total sulfur dioxide level in the wine */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphates content in the wine */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content in the wine */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality rating assigned to the wine */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the wine */,
  "aroma" TEXT /* Description of the wine's aroma */,
  "taste_profile" TEXT /* Description of the wine's taste profile */,
  "visual_clarity" TEXT /* Visual clarity of the wine */,
  "bouquet" TEXT /* Description of the wine's bouquet */,
  "texture" TEXT /* Description of the wine's texture */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Description of the wine's finish */,
  "sustainability_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the sustainability of the production process */,
  "aroma_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the wine's aroma */,
  "taste_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the wine's taste */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_quality_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wineries" (
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winery */,
  "winery_name" TEXT /* Name of the winery */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the winery (e.g., Napa Valley, California) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the winery */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the winery was established */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the winery owner */,
  "total_acreage" INTEGER /* Total acreage of the winery's vineyards */,
  "annual_production_capacity" INTEGER /* Annual production capacity in liters */,
  "eco_friendly_practices" TEXT /* Whether the winery uses eco-friendly practices */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the winery holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grape_varieties" (
  "grape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grape variety */,
  "grape_name" TEXT /* Name of the grape variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grape variety */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the grape variety */,
  "typical_flavors" TEXT /* Typical flavors associated with the grape variety */,
  "best_climates" TEXT /* Best climates for growing the grape variety */,
  "ripening_period" TEXT /* Average ripening period for the grape variety */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* Resistance to common diseases */,
  "average_yield" INTEGER /* Average yield per acre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Climate type of the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the region */,
  "average_rainfall" INTEGER /* Average annual rainfall in millimeters */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average annual temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "topography" TEXT /* Description of the region's topography */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., winemaker, quality analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assessors" (
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessor */,
  "assessor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the assessor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the assessor */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the assessor holds */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in wine quality assessment */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations in specific types of wine or regions */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessor's last training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasting_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tasting note */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample for which the note is made */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessor who wrote the note */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Comments and notes from the tasting session */,
  "tasting_date" TEXT /* Date when the tasting occurred */,
  "aroma_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the wine's aroma */,
  "taste_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the wine's taste */,
  "visual_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the wine's visual appearance */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating for the wine */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Whether the assessor recommends the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasting_notes_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES quality_assessors ("assessor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasting_notes_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine related to this batch */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch was produced */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity produced in the batch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the batch (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "bottle_count" INTEGER /* Number of bottles produced in the batch */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Cost of producing the batch */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price per bottle */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor (if applicable) */,
  "batch_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_quality_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality assessment */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the quality was recorded */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score based on historical evaluations */,
  "aroma_score" INTEGER /* Historical aroma score */,
  "taste_score" INTEGER /* Historical taste score */,
  "visual_score" INTEGER /* Historical visual score */,
  "overall_score" INTEGER /* Historical overall score */,
  "sustainability_score" INTEGER /* Historical sustainability score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_quality_data_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_quality_data_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES wine_quality ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
